login.access_your_portal: Access your portal to manage your account and settings.

errors.user_not_found: No account found with this email address.
errors.password_not_set: You have not set a password yet. Please set a password to access your account.
errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.account_not_activated: Your account has not been activated yet. Please contact your administrator to set a password.

register.page_description: Join the Crystal Kairos community and grow your wealth today

interests.interests_description: Select all the services you are interested in. Select all that apply.

assumptions.title: Assumptions Checklist
assumptions.description: Please read and confirm the following to ensure you meet our membership criteria.
assumptions.has-smart-phone: I have access to a smartphone or computer and a stable internet connection to manage my account.
assumptions.has-integrity: I understand that membership requires integrity and commitment to cooperative principles.
assumptions.is-trustworthy: I am trustworthy and honest in my dealings.
assumptions.has-internet-access: I have access to a stable internet connection to manage my account.
assumptions.has-email: I have a valid email address for communication.
assumptions.has-whats-app: I have a valid WhatsApp number for communication.

review.before_declaration: I hereby declare that the information provided above is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge. I agree to abide by the
review.after_declaration: and Bylaws of Crystal Kairos Cooperative.

success.title: Congratulations!!!
success.description: Your application has been received. We will look into it and get back to you within 7 working days

set_password.page_description: Set your password to access your account and manage your membership.
set_password.success: Password set successfully. You will be redirected to the login page in {{seconds}} seconds.
